vocab.exampleEn: Precise language makes an answer easier to understand.
vocab.exampleZh: 精确的语言让答案更容易理解。
vocab.upgradeEn: Use precise language/details/data for IELTS reading and writing.
vocab.upgradeZh: 常用搭配：precise language / details / data。

cycle.summaryEn: Use short sets to build speed, focus, and calm under pressure.
cycle.summaryZh: 用短小测练速度、专注和压力下的稳定性。

frame.useEn: Use to show your opinion clearly.

meaningEn: This reading word helps Becky understand questions and paraphrases faster.
meaningZh: 这个阅读词可以帮助 Becky 更快看懂题目和改写。
promptEn: China drill: read the Chinese meaning, shadow the example twice, then make one Becky-style sentence with "precise" using In my view, ...
promptZh: 中文母语者练法：先看中文意思，跟读例句两遍，再用 "precise" 和 在我看来，... 写一句 Becky 自己的话。
sourceEn: This harder word is auto-picked for Becky and refreshes every day with a China-friendly output drill.
sourceZh: 这个高分词会每天自动为 Becky 刷新，并配中文母语者适用的输出练习。
